ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aster DM Healthcare Limited has officially changed its name to Aster DM Quality Care Limited, effective July 3, 2026, as a direct consequence of its Scheme of Amalgamation with Quality Care India Limited. This corporate restructuring primarily impacts the company's legal identity and branding, reflecting the integration of the two entities. The announcement explicitly states that stakeholder rights and liabilities remain unaffected, and no immediate red flags are indicated in this routine corporate action.
